name: ruby-base64
title: ruby-base64
summary: support for encoding and decoding binary data using a Base64 representation
description:
support for encoding and decoding binary data using a Base64 representation
This Ruby library provides methods to easily encode and decode binary data
using a Base64 representation.
.
The purpose of using base64 to encode data is that it translates any
binary data into purely printable characters.
.
This package provides a newer version than the one bundled with the current
ruby interpreter.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-base64 because support for encoding and decoding binary data using a Base64 representation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-base64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-base64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-base64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
